summary: V12_HEBBIAN ablation test passes vacuously — fresh engine instantiation bypasses factory-ablated instance; threshold too lenient (0.05); all prior V12 PASS results unreliable

timeline.event: V12_HEBBIAN criterion added in commit 086725bf (feat: V13-V18 implemented)
V12 ablation test passes all runs including adversarial no_hebbian scenario — zero failures detected
DD62 deep-dive audit discovers test creates fresh ConsciousnessEngine instead of using factory-ablated instance
Codebase scan flags P0 (URGENT_ACTION_LIST.md), P1 vacuous tests (test_conscious_memory.hexa), P2 stub pipeline (expand_instruct_ko.hexa)

root_cause.primary: V12 ablation test instantiates a new engine on the verification path instead of receiving the factory-produced ablated engine. Fresh engine has _coupling initialized to non-None, so coupling_change_ratio always exceeds 0.05 threshold even when Hebbian learning is disabled. Threshold itself (0.05 = 5% of initial) is too lenient; observed ratios range 1.67x-9.75x.
root_cause.secondary_p1: test_conscious_memory.hexa: all 10 test functions are empty stubs (// TODO[assert]) ported from Python. No assertions, pass vacuously, zero coverage for conscious memory subsystem.
root_cause.secondary_p2: expand_instruct_ko.hexa: quality_filter, dedup_hash, convert_sample are print-only stubs. Korean instruction-expansion data pipeline non-functional.

impact: Ablation coverage for Hebbian coupling is zero — any regression in Hebbian learning undetected
All prior V12 PASS results are unreliable and must not be used as evidence
Conscious memory module has no test coverage — regressions invisible
Korean instruction data expansion pipeline blocked
mitigation_applied: Marked V12_HEBBIAN as tier=rubber_stamp with audit=BUG in config/verification.json
V12 PASS status excluded from all verification gates until fix lands
test_conscious_memory.hexa results flagged as non-evidence in verification reports

preventive_actions.action: Fix V12 test: pass factory-ablated engine instance to verification path. Raise threshold from 0.05 to >= 1.0
Add ablation kill-switch assertion: if scenario is no_hebbian, assert coupling_change_ratio < threshold (must FAIL to prove ablation works)
Fill test_conscious_memory.hexa assertions: implement real assertions for all 10 test cases
Implement expand_instruct_ko.hexa stubs or remove the file
Introduce verification-tier audit rule: any rubber_stamp criterion must include adversarial scenario expected to FAIL. CI enforces at least one adversarial case per criterion
Ban vacuous tests in CI: lint pass that rejects test functions with only comments and no assertions
